data.name: Hentai Akari
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Akari is an interactive puzzle game where players are invited to assemble various erotic images featuring the charming girl Akari. She loves romance and intimate moments, so each level takes place against the backdrop of a cozy bedroom, adding an atmosphere of privacy and comfort.

Each subsequent level becomes more challenging, introducing more details and elements to assemble, creating a delightful challenge for players. The difficulty increases gradually, so each new puzzle brings greater enjoyment and tests your attention and patience.

Features of the game:

  • Achievements;

  • Sex toys;

  • Mode "GOD";

  • Difficulty levels;

  • Relaxing and romantic music.

The game has simple controls and appealing graphics that create a unique atmosphere, allowing you to fully immerse yourself in Akari's world. There's also a "GOD" mode—try it if you get tired of assembling puzzles!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB GeForce or AMD
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
